name: BackgroundMellow: A Multi-Modal Cohesive Framework for Narrative-Driven Rich Cinematic Soundscape Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.11364v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Generating immersive, synchronized and cinematic audio for long-form textual narratives remains a significant challenge in multi-modal AI. While cu...
description: arXiv:2607.11364v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Generating immersive, synchronized and cinematic audio for long-form textual narratives remains a significant challenge in multi-modal AI. While current Text-to-Audio (TTA) frameworks successfully synthesize isolated sound effects, they struggle with narrative cohesion, temporal alignment, and cinematic emotional depth. We present BackgroundMell...
author: Ajitesh Jamulkar, Aritra Hazra
